channel.title: Posts on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog

item.title: Fist_Blog
item.description: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step THis a blog to be build as my knowleage base.

How to install netcore/aspnetcore 2.1.4 on RHEL 6.8 Install RHEL 6.8 Pass Install netcore 2.1.4 sdk #!/bin/sh yum install -y wget epel-release yum install -y openssl-devel libnghttp2-devel libidn-devel gcc libtool m4 automake cd /tmp/ curl -O https://curl.haxx.se/download/curl-7.45.0.tar.gz tar -xf curl-7.45.0.tar.gz cd curl-7.45.0 ./configure \ --disable-dict \ --disable-file \ --disable-ftp \ --disable-gopher \ --disable-imap \ --disable-ldap \ --disable-ldaps \ --disable-libcurl-option \ --disable-manual \ --disable-pop3 \ --disable-rtsp \ --disable-smb \ --disable-smtp \ --disable-telnet \ --disable-tftp \ --enable-ipv6 \ --enable-optimize \ --enable-symbol-hiding \ --with-ca-bundle=/etc/pki/tls/certs/ca-bundle.
